message:
Improve comments in changelog stub files

Clarify that these placeholders exist for build compatibility and are
overwritten by sync-changelog.mjs at build time.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -2,4 +2,7 @@
 title: Changelog
 ---
 
-Run `pnpm sync:changelog` to fetch changelog content from the news repository.
+{/* Auto-generated by scripts/sync-changelog.mjs - do not edit manually. */}
+{/* This placeholder exists so builds succeed before sync runs. */}
+
+Run `pnpm sync:changelog` to populate changelog content.
